title: [HMI] HOLD MY ACTIONS!
description:
HOLD MY ACTIONS!, A HMI REANIMATION

Replace HMI example pack with this one
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/3kSWqYrKFPI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>**HOLD MY ACTION! (HMI Reanimation)**

This pack is a complete rework of HMI’s animations, designed to feel smoother, sharper, and more responsive across the board. Every action has been refined or rebuilt to improve flow, impact, and overall feel during gameplay.

Sword animations have been upgraded for cleaner, more responsive swings, while new mining and pickaxe strike animations bring more weight and realism to resource gathering. Tools like the shovel, hoe, and axe have all been updated—with the axe now fully supporting shield usage for better combat integration.

Combat and interaction animations have also been enhanced, including a smoother hand hit animation and a more fluid shield movement system. Eating mechanics have been reworked for a more natural feel, and Killa’s custom bow animation has been added for a unique touch.

For players who prefer classic mechanics, 1.8 combat compatibility is now available through resource pack options.

**How to use:**
Simply replace HMI’s example pack with this one and you’re ready to go.
